title: 7 Best ConvertKit Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Compare top ConvertKit alternatives. Find the best email marketing tool for creators, bloggers, and small businesses with free trials.
intro: While ConvertKit is a popular choice for creators, it may not be the perfect fit for everyoneŚwhether due to pricing, feature limitations, or specific workflow needs. We've reviewed the top alternatives that offer competitive features, better value, or specialized tools for different creator types and business models.
why_switch: More affordable pricing starting at $9-13/month compared to ConvertKit's $29
Better free tier limitsŚsome alternatives offer up to 100,000 free subscribers vs ConvertKit's 1,000
Specialized features like SMS marketing, CRM integration, webinars, or monetization tools not included in ConvertKit

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv stands out with built-in newsletter monetization, an ad network, and referral programs that help creators generate revenue directly from their audience. If you're focused on growing and monetizing a newsletter, Beehiiv's creator-centric features and excellent 4.7 G2 rating make it a superior choice to ConvertKit.

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite offers the best value with plans starting at just $9/month and a generous free tier supporting 1,000 subscribers. Its intuitive drag-and-drop editor, automation, landing pages, and pop-ups make it ideal for budget-conscious creators who don't want to compromise on functionality.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines powerful email marketing with a full CRM, lead scoring, and advanced automationŚfeatures ConvertKit lacks. If you need to manage complex customer relationships and sophisticated marketing workflows, ActiveCampaign's enterprise-grade tools are worth the investment.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp offers a completely free tier with up to 500 subscribers and paid plans starting at just $13/month, making it one of the most accessible alternatives. Its extensive integrations, A/B testing, and audience segmentation provide solid marketing capabilities for small teams and startups.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo's free tier is unmatched with support for 100,000 subscribers at no cost, plus SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat channels included. It's the best choice for creators wanting a complete communication platform beyond email without upgrading to paid plans.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse uniquely combines email marketing with built-in webinar hosting, online course creation tools, and conversion funnelsŚmaking it perfect for course creators. This all-in-one approach eliminates the need for multiple subscriptions that ConvertKit users often require.

alternatives.name: Substack
alternatives.key_difference: Substack is the best choice for writers who want to monetize through paid subscriptions without managing payments separately. With built-in subscription functionality, a discovery network, and podcast hosting, it's designed specifically for independent creators building direct relationships with readers.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with support for 100,000 subscribers plus SMS and chat features. However, if you prefer a more creator-focused experience, Beehiiv's free tier supports 2,500 subscribers with monetization tools, or MailerLite's free plan at 1,000 subscribers offers excellent usability and landing pages.

faq.q: What is the best ConvertKit alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is ideal for small businesses, offering exceptional value at $9/month with automation, landing pages, surveys, and e-commerce integrations. For businesses needing CRM capabilities, ActiveCampaign is the better choice despite higher pricing, as it combines email marketing with comprehensive customer relationship management.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to ConvertKit?
faq.a: YesŚMailerLite ($9/month), Mailchimp ($13/month), and GetResponse ($19/month) all offer lower starting prices than ConvertKit's $29/month. For completely free options, Brevo and Beehiiv have generous free tiers that may eliminate the need to pay for an email platform at all.
